description: A new reseller partner has signed a contract and needs to be set up in the system and trained.

nodes.task_description: Create a new partner account in the CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the new partner in the system.

nodes.task_description: Grant the partner access to the partner portal, which contains marketing materials and deal registration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provisions access to the partner portal.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a welcome and training session with the new partner.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the partner onboarding session.
